manga.title: Dragon throne
manga.description: A transmigration out of the blue and he had reincarnated as the Eldest Crown Prince of the Eastern Dragon Palace, Ao Fan. He had to inherit the Eastern Dragon Palace and become the next Eastern Dragon King. At the time of the crisis, Ao Fan discovered the existence of the system and activated it which brings him lots of items and points! "Deities killing one another, fighting anyone I meet on the way. I'll defeat anyone who refuses to comply with me!" He swore to lead the Dragon Clan to rise again and contend for hegemony among the divine investitures!
